description_long: This is a modern, single-story house with a flat roof and a spacious, open layout. The exterior features a combination of light beige and gray walls, large windows, and a prominent front entryway with a paved driveway leading to multiple garages. The property includes landscaped areas with green lawns, flowering trees, and a backyard patio with outdoor seating. Several cars are parked in the driveway and garages, and a blue car is visible on the street outside. The house has multiple rooms, including bedrooms, bathrooms, a kitchen, and living spaces, all arranged around a central hallway. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, functional spaces, and a blend of indoor and outdoor living.
description: A modern, single-story house with a flat roof, large windows, multiple garages, and landscaped yards. The design features clean lines, open spaces, and a blend of indoor and outdoor areas.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, three garages, driveway, and landscaped front yard with flowering trees.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the backyard lawn, multiple parked cars, and the blue car on the street.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard patio, large windows, and access to the outdoor living area.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the green backyard, additional parking, and the arrangement of interior rooms.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows and some grouped in rows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a wide door, paved steps, small porch, and flanked by large windows and decorative landscaping
